# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

apiVersion: "2024-03-01"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
metadata:
  description: "ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running web application - Phase 1 deployment"

parameters:
  projectName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "webapp"
    metadata:
      description: "Project name used for resource naming"
  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "dev"
    allowedValues:
      - "dev"
      - "staging"
      - "prod"
    metadata:
      description: "Deployment environment"
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: "Azure region for all resources"
  vmCount:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2
    minValue: 1
    maxValue: 10
    metadata:
      description: "Number of VMs to deploy"
  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "Standard_D2s_v3"
    allowedValues:
      - "Standard_D2s_v3"
      - "Standard_D4s_v3"
      - "Standard_D8s_v3"
    metadata:
      description: "Size of the Virtual Machines"
  adminUsername:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "Administrator username for the VMs"
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: "Administrator password for the VMs"
  osDiskSizeGB:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 128
    metadata:
      description: "OS disk size in GB"
  dataDiskSizeGB:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 256
    metadata:
      description: "Data disk size in GB"
  dataDiskCount:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 1
    minValue: 1
    maxValue: 4
    metadata:
      description: "Number of data disks per VM"
  vnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "10.0.0.0/16"
    metadata:
      description: "Virtual Network address prefix"
  subnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "10.0.1.0/24"
    metadata:
      description: "Subnet address prefix"
  enableDiskEncryption:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: "Enable Azure Disk Encryption with platform-managed keys (SSE). Should be true for all environments."
  enableHostEncryption:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: "Enable encryption at host for end-to-end encryption"

variables:
  vnetName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-vnet')]"
  subnetName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-subnet')]"
  nsgName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-nsg')]"
  availabilitySetName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-avset')]"
  loadBalancerName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-lb')]"
  lbPublicIPName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-lb-pip')]"
  diagnosticsStorageName: "[concat(replace(parameters('projectName'), '-', ''), parameters('environment'), 'diag', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  lbFrontendName: "LoadBalancerFrontEnd"
  lbBackendPoolName: "LoadBalancerBackEndPool"
  lbProbeName: "httpProbe"
  lbRuleName: "httpRule"

resources:
  # Network Security Group with restrictive rules
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[variables('nsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        # Allow HTTP from Load Balancer only
        - name: "Allow-HTTP-From-LB"
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "AzureLoadBalancer"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "80"
        # Allow HTTPS from Load Balancer only
        - name: "Allow-HTTPS-From-LB"
          properties:
            priority: 110
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "AzureLoadBalancer"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "443"
        # Deny all other inbound traffic
        - name: "Deny-All-Inbound"
          properties:
            priority: 4096
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Deny"
            protocol: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"

  # Virtual Network
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[variables('vnetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
      subnets:
        - name: "[variables('subnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('subnetAddressPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"

  # Diagnostics Storage Account
  - type: "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[variables('diagnosticsStorageName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Standard_LRS"
    kind: "StorageV2"
    properties:
      minimumTlsVersion: "TLS1_2"
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: "Deny"
        bypass: "AzureServices"

  # Availability Set
  - type: "Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets"
    apiVersion: "2024-03-01"
    name: "[variables('availabilitySetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Aligned"
    properties:
      platformFaultDomainCount: 2
      platformUpdateDomainCount: 5

  # Load Balancer Public IP
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[variables('lbPublicIPName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Standard"
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: "Static"
      dnsSettings:
        domainNameLabel: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"

  # Load Balancer
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[variables('loadBalancerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Standard"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('lbPublicIPName'))]"
    properties:
      frontendIPConfigurations:
        - name: "[variables('lbFrontendName')]"
          properties:
            publicIPAddress:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('lbPublicIPName'))]"
      backendAddressPools:
        - name: "[variables('lbBackendPoolName')]"
      probes:
        - name: "[variables('lbProbeName')]"
          properties:
            protocol: "Http"
            port: 80
            requestPath: "/health"
            intervalInSeconds: 15
            numberOfProbes: 2
      loadBalancingRules:
        - name: "[variables('lbRuleName')]"
          properties:
            frontendIPConfiguration:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/frontendIPConfigurations', variables('loadBalancerName'), variables('lbFrontendName'))]"
            backendAddressPool:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/backendAddressPools', variables('loadBalancerName'), variables('lbBackendPoolName'))]"
            probe:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/probes', variables('loadBalancerName'), variables('lbProbeName'))]"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            frontendPort: 80
            backendPort: 80
            enableFloatingIP: false
            idleTimeoutInMinutes: 4

  # Network Interfaces (no public IPs on VMs - traffic through LB only)
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces"
    apiVersion: "2023-09-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-nic-', copyIndex(1))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', variables('vnetName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers', variables('loadBalancerName'))]"
    copy:
      name: "nicLoop"
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: "ipconfig1"
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"
            subnet:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', variables('vnetName'), variables('subnetName'))]"
            loadBalancerBackendAddressPools:
              - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/backendAddressPools', variables('loadBalancerName'), variables('lbBackendPoolName'))]"

  # Virtual Machines
  - type: "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines"
    apiVersion: "2024-03-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-vm-', copyIndex(1))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-nic-', copyIndex(1)))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets', variables('availabilitySetName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('diagnosticsStorageName'))]"
    copy:
      name: "vmLoop"
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
    properties:
      availabilitySet:
        id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets', variables('availabilitySetName'))]"
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: "[parameters('vmSize')]"
      securityProfile:
        encryptionAtHost: "[parameters('enableHostEncryption')]"
        securityType: "TrustedLaunch"
        uefiSettings:
          secureBootEnabled: true
          vTpmEnabled: true
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: "Canonical"
          offer: "0001-com-ubuntu-server-jammy"
          sku: "22_04-lts-gen2"
          version: "latest"
        osDisk:
          name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-vm-', copyIndex(1), '-osdisk')]"
          createOption: "FromImage"
          diskSizeGB: "[parameters('osDiskSizeGB')]"
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: "Premium_LRS"
            securityProfile:
              securityEncryptionType: "[if(parameters('enableDiskEncryption'), 'DiskWithVMGuestState', json('null'))]"
          caching: "ReadWrite"
          deleteOption: "Delete"
        copy:
          - name: "dataDisks"
            count: "[parameters('dataDiskCount')]"
            input:
              name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-vm-', copyIndex('vmLoop', 1), '-datadisk-', copyIndex('dataDisks', 1))]"
              lun: "[copyIndex('dataDisks')]"
              createOption: "Empty"
              diskSizeGB: "[parameters('dataDiskSizeGB')]"
              managedDisk:
                storageAccountType: "Premium_LRS"
              caching: "ReadOnly"
              deleteOption: "Delete"
      osProfile:
        computerName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-vm-', copyIndex(1))]"
        adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
        adminPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
        linuxConfiguration:
          disablePasswordAuthentication: false
          provisionVMAgent: true
          patchSettings:
            patchMode: "AutomaticByPlatform"
            automaticByPlatformSettings:
              rebootSetting: "IfRequired"
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-nic-', copyIndex(1)))]"
            properties:
              primary: true
      diagnosticsProfile:
        bootDiagnostics:
          enabled: true
          storageUri: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('diagnosticsStorageName')), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      project: "[parameters('projectName')]"
      managedBy: "ARM-template"
      phase: "1-architecture-validation"

  # Custom Script Extension to set up web application
  - type: "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/extensions"
    apiVersion: "2024-03-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-vm-', copyIndex(1), '/webapp-setup')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-vm-', copyIndex(1)))]"
    copy:
      name: "extensionLoop"
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
    properties:
      publisher: "Microsoft.Azure.Extensions"
      type: "CustomScript"
      typeHandlerVersion: "2.1"
      autoUpgradeMinorVersion: true
      protectedSettings:
        commandToExecute: |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -euo pipefail

          # Format and mount data disk
          DEVICE="/dev/disk/azure/scsi1/lun0"
          MOUNT_POINT="/datadrive"

          if [ -b "$DEVICE" ]; then
            if ! blkid "$DEVICE"; then
              mkfs.ext4 -F "$DEVICE"
            fi
            mkdir -p "$MOUNT_POINT"
            UUID=$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$DEVICE")
            if ! grep -q "$UUID" /etc/fstab; then
              echo "UUID=$UUID $MOUNT_POINT ext4 defaults,nofail,discard 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
            fi
            mount -a
          fi

          # Install and configure nginx as web server
          apt-get update -y
          apt-get install -y nginx

          # Create health check endpoint
          mkdir -p /var/www/html
          echo '{"status":"healthy"}' > /var/www/html/health

          # Configure nginx
          cat > /etc/nginx/sites-available/default <<'EOF'
          server {
              listen 80 default_server;
              listen [::]:80 default_server;
              root /var/www/html;
              index index.html;

              location /health {
                  default_type application/json;
                  try_files /health =404;
              }

              location / {
                  try_files $uri $uri/ =404;
              }
          }
          EOF

          systemctl enable nginx
          systemctl restart nginx

outputs:
  loadBalancerPublicIP:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('lbPublicIPName'))).ipAddress]"
  loadBalancerFQDN:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', variables('lbPublicIPName'))).dnsSettings.fqdn]"
  vmNames:
    type: array
    copy:
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      input:
        vmName: "[concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-vm-', copyIndex(1))]"
        privateIP: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('projectName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-nic-', copyIndex(1)))).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress]"
  securityNotes:
    type: object
    value:
      diskEncryptionSSE: "[if(parameters('enableDiskEncryption'), 'Enabled - Server-Side Encryption with platform-managed keys', 'WARNING: Disk encryption is disabled')]"
      encryptionAtHost: "[if(parameters('enableHostEncryption'), 'Enabled - End-to-end encryption for VM disks', 'WARNING: Host encryption is disabled')]"
      trustedLaunch: "Enabled - Secure Boot and vTPM active"
      networkSecurity: "VMs have no public IPs; traffic flows through Load Balancer only"
      nsgRules: "Inbound restricted to HTTP/HTTPS from Azure Load Balancer; all other inbound denied"
      phase2Recommendations:
        - "Enable Azure Disk Encryption (ADE) with customer-managed keys in Azure Key Vault for additional disk encryption layer"
        - "Configure SSH key-based authentication and disable password authentication"
        - "Enable Microsoft Defender for Cloud on VMs"
        - "Configure Azure Bastion for secure VM management access"
        - "Enable TLS termination on the Load Balancer or configure HTTPS on nginx"
        - "Implement Azure Monitor and Log Analytics for centralized logging"
        - "Configure backup policies with Azure Backup"
        - "Review and restrict NSG rules further based on actual traffic patterns"
